message:
fix(acp): address review findings for PR #2358

1. Return ErrACPActive (not ErrAlreadyRunning) from Start() when ACP is
   active, so callers in start.go and up.go can distinguish ACP mode.
2. Check ensureMayorInfra error in runMayorAcp (was silently discarded).
3. Rename ACAgentFilePath -> ACPAgentFilePath for naming consistency
   with ACPPidFilePath.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
